channel.title: Global Green HP - GGP-OS Platform
channel.description: Cannabis compliance, telehealth, and business management platform

item.g:title: Medical Marijuana Card Recommendation - Online Consultation
item.g:description: Get your medical marijuana card recommendation through our certified telehealth platform. Licensed physicians in your state evaluate your qualifying conditions via secure video consultation. Fast, affordable, and 100% compliant with state regulations. Available in Oklahoma, Arkansas, Alabama, and 40+ states.

item.g:title: Health and Wellness Consultation - Telehealth Visit
item.g:description: Comprehensive health and wellness consultation with certified healthcare professionals. Our telehealth platform connects you with providers who understand holistic wellness, integrative medicine, and patient-centered care. Includes follow-up support and personalized wellness plan.

item.g:title: General Patient Support - Cannabis Care Navigation
item.g:description: Personalized patient support for navigating the medical cannabis program in your state. Our care navigators help with application status, renewal reminders, finding dispensaries, understanding your rights, and connecting with physicians. Ongoing support included.

item.g:title: Medical Marijuana Card Renewal - Fast Online Process
item.g:description: Renew your medical marijuana card quickly and affordably through our secure telehealth platform. No need to visit a clinic — complete your renewal consultation from home. Licensed physicians verify your qualifying conditions and submit your renewal to the state. Available nationwide.

item.g:title: GGP-OS Cannabis Business Compliance Platform
item.g:description: All-in-one cannabis business management and compliance platform. Features include Metrc integration, seed-to-sale tracking, SINC oversight directives, retail compliance monitoring, employee management, and automated state reporting. Built for dispensaries, cultivators, processors, and transporters in all legal states.

item.g:title: Cannabis Legal Consultation - Attorney Marketplace
item.g:description: Connect with qualified cannabis attorneys through our attorney marketplace. Get legal support for traffic stops, misdemeanors, business compliance issues, licensing disputes, and regulatory defense. Our network includes attorneys specializing in cannabis law across all legal states.

item.g:title: Cannabis Compliance Online Training Classes
item.g:description: Professional online training courses covering cannabis compliance, Metrc operations, seed-to-sale tracking, retail operations, and state-specific regulatory requirements. Perfect for dispensary staff, compliance officers, and cannabis business owners preparing for licensing or audits.

item.g:title: Cannabis Business IT Technical Support
item.g:description: Dedicated IT technical support for cannabis businesses. Get help with POS system setup, Metrc API integration, security camera compliance, network infrastructure, and point-of-sale troubleshooting. Our technicians understand the unique technology requirements of cannabis operations.
